2604.13474.title: Secure and Privacy-Preserving Vertical Federated Learning
2604.13474.paper_summary: We propose a novel end-to-end privacy-preserving framework, instantiated by three efficient protocols for different deployment scenarios, covering both input and output privacy, for the vertically split scenario in federated learning (FL), where features are split across clients and labels are not shared by all parties. We do so by distributing the role of the aggregator in FL into multiple servers and having them run secure multiparty computation (MPC) protocols to perform model and feature aggregation and apply differential privacy (DP) to the final released model. While a naive solution would have the clients delegating the entirety of training to run in MPC between the servers, our optimized solution, which supports purely global and also global-local models updates with privacy-preserving, drastically reduces the amount of computation and communication performed using multiparty computation. The experimental results also show the effectiveness of our protocols.
2604.13474.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個新穎的端到端隱私保護框架，通過三個高效的協議針對不同的部署場景進行實現，涵蓋了輸入和輸出隱私，適用於聯邦學習（FL）中的垂直拆分場景，其中特徵在客戶端之間拆分，而標籤並未由所有方共享。<lb/>我們通過將FL中聚合器的角色分配到多個伺服器，並讓它們運行安全的多方計算（MPC）協議來執行模型和特徵聚合，並對最終發布的模型應用差分隱私（DP）。<lb/>雖然一個天真的解決方案會讓客戶端將整個訓練委託給伺服器之間的MPC運行，但我們的優化解決方案支持純全球和全球-局部模型更新，同時保護隱私，顯著減少了使用多方計算進行的計算和通信量。<lb/>實驗結果也顯示了我們協議的有效性。
2604.13474.author: Shan Jin et.al.
2604.13474.authors: Shan Jin, Sai Rahul Rachuri, Yizhen Wang, Anderson C. A. Nascimento, Yiwei Cai
